intro1: A family atelier in Vienna for the pieces you're attached to.
intro2: Shoes, bags, leather goods, from daily companions to those from the great houses. Every piece deserves an honest assessment and a careful hand.
s1_desc: Soles, heels, stitching. For shoes meant to walk many more years.
s2_desc: Cleaning, colour refresh, repairs for bags and fine leather.
decl_body: Restorations usually two to four weeks. Your piece gets the time it needs.
form_head: What would you like us to look at?
form_intro: Describe your piece, send a few photos if you like. We'll reply personally via WhatsApp.
ph_desc: Briefly describe the issue or the service you need…
msg_photo: *[I will attach photos of the item below]*
